name: Indoor courtyard
description: An open-air patio nested inside the building footprint: a roofless room walled on four sides, with paved stone ground around a central 3x3 grass patch. Four corner columns rise above the wall top, four stairs-benches line the walls facing inward, flower pots and a small sapling-tree turn it into a quiet 'tree place' at the heart of the dwelling.

required_furniture.rule: Full @secondary rectangle at y0 covering the AABB — the stone ground around the planted area.
Central 3x3 `minecraft:grass_block` patch overriding the paving at y0; this is the soil where the sapling/tree is planted.
Four @primary columns at the AABB corners, rising 2-3 blocks above the wall top — the patio's visual frame.
One @stairs bench against each of the four walls, facing inward toward the centre of the courtyard.
Central feature: a 1-block @primary pedestal capped with a `minecraft:flower_pot` (medieval/fantasy), or a fence-post lantern (`@fence` + `minecraft:lantern`) for modern style.
Symmetric `minecraft:flower_pot` arrangement on the paving near the four corners of the central grass patch — at least 2 even on the smallest AABB.
1 `minecraft:oak_sapling` planted on the grass patch (2 saplings on AABBs >= 8x8) — the courtyard's tree.

placement_rules: Central feature stands on the middle grass cell of the 3x3 patch.
Benches sit one block inside each wall, centred on the perpendicular axis, with stairs `facing` pointing toward the wall behind so the sitter looks into the patio.
Flower pots and saplings sit at y0 + 1, on top of the paving or grass; never overlap with bench cells.
Corner columns extend above the perimeter wall so the open-air silhouette reads as framed, not abandoned.
lighting_ventilation: Because the courtyard is roofless, daylight fills the space and natural ventilation is unrestricted (the open sky doubles as both skylight and chimney). At night the central lantern (modern variant) or torch-lit perimeter walls cover the night-light budget without breaking the open-air feel.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone walls and columns with oak-stair benches — the cloister/keep patio of a medieval manor.

modern.notes: Smooth stone paving and quartz walls; the central feature is a lantern on an iron-bar post instead of a flower-pot pedestal.

fantasy.notes: Mossy-cobblestone walls and dark-oak benches — an overgrown, enchanted cloister with a sapling tree at its heart.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.courtyard_indoor.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
